items.title: Automated research cycle completed in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: The latest automated research cycle has been successfully completed, covering 16 candidates from various sources including the watchlist, pipeline, and GeckoTerminal. Key findings include a hold recommendation for SOL and ORCA, while 14 candidates were skipped due to low liquidity or suspicious activity. All data sources are operational, ensuring reliable insights for future analyses.

items.title: New Research Cycle Published in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: The latest research cycle for April 29, 2026, has been published, featuring a detailed analysis of 17 candidates. Key findings include 9 candidates on the watchlist and 7 new listings, with specific actions recommended for each. Notably, several candidates were skipped due to liquidity concerns and potential risks identified during the review.
